verdict: Silver RSI at 29.9 signals exhaustion after a −23.7% drawdown, but rising US 10Y yield to 4.42% (+4 bps)—the dominant scoring factor—keeps structural headwinds intact despite technical oversold conditions. Macro opportunity-cost pressures from rate-hike expectations override near-term mean-reversion bounce potential, producing a bearish 3/10 overall conviction. Monitor US 10Y yield and Fed commentary for evidence of rate-hike expectations moderating; if 10Y yields fall below 4.30%, technical bounce conditions may gain traction.
